---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in Atta
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `...`
2. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or screenshots if applicable.

## Environment

- **OS**: (e.g., macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04)
- **Node.js version**: (e.g., 22.x)
- **AI tool**: (e.g., Claude Code, Copilot CLI, Codex CLI)
- **Atta version**: (check `.claude/.metadata/version`)
- **Install method**: (npx atta-dev init / manual copy)
